name: investigate
description: Investigate a reported error or incident end to end across every reachable system, never inferring past a missing source — stop and raise to the human for access or clarity instead. Builds an access ledger, batch-raises blockers up front, digs wide through logs/state/code/history, and delivers a root-cause report plus a proposed (unapplied) fix. Claude-Code-leaning (AskUserQuestion + read-only subagents + MCP access ledger).
